name: Personal Portfolio
description: A modern personal portfolio website showcasing projects, achievements, certificates, education, skills, and contact information with a dynamic admin panel for managing content.
impact: Built a complete portfolio system with dynamic project, achievement, and certificate management. The admin panel allows adding, editing, deleting, reordering, and uploading images without changing code, making the portfolio easy to maintain and update.

name: Nbn  Mits Desk
description: MITS NbN Desk is a paperless student request portal for NOC, Bonafide, No Dues, and approvals.

name: Divya Yatra – Smart Pilgrimage Assistance System
description: Divya Yatra is an AI-powered smart pilgrimage management platform designed for Simhastha 2028. The system focuses on smart mobility, crowd intelligence, safety, and digital engagement for pilgrims.
impact:
Priority-based ticketing
Smart navigation & alternate routing
Live crowd monitoring (AI heatmaps)
Dynamic notice board
Live darshan streaming
Smart parking system
AI lost & found
Travel planner & chatbot
Accessibility support for elderly & differently-abled

name: Travel Accommodation Platform
description: WonderLust is a modern, high-end travel booking platform designed to connect travelers with unique stays and experiences. Built with the MERN Stack, it features a stunning Glassmorphism UI, Dynamic UPI Payments, and Interactive Maps.
impact:
Premium Glassmorphism Design: A visually striking interface with blur effects, smooth gradients, and elegant typography.
Fluid Animations: Powered by Framer Motion for seamless page transitions and interaction feedback.
Responsive Layout: Fully optimized for Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile devices.

name: EduVault - Digital Document Locker
description: EduVault is a secure MERN stack application allowing users to store and manage personal documents like certificates, resumes, and IDs
impact:
User Authentication: Secure Signup/Login with JWT.
Document Management: Upload, View, Delete, and Categorize documents.
Secure Storage: Files are stored securely (Server-side storage implemented).
Responsive UI: Modern, glassmorphism-inspired design.
Filtering: Search and filter documents by category.

name: Run-Time QR Generator
description: Create flawless, scannable UPI payment QR codes instantly directly in your browser. This application provides a beautifully crafted premium dark mode interface with offline capabilities — your data is never sent to any server.
impact:
Instant Generation: Generate codes by simply typing a UPI ID and (optional) payee name or amount.
Deep-Link Ready: Creates a compliant upi://pay deep link that launches directly into any UPI app (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm).
One-Click Download: Instantly export a high-quality, perfectly squared PNG of your QR Code.
Ultra-Premium UI: Glassmorphic styling, ambient background glows, animated gradients, and 100% responsiveness.
Micro-Interactions: Features a dedicated toast notification system, quick-copy to clipboard logic, and interactive hover states.
